rationale: The citing editorial mentions Kirmani and Zhu (2007) once in a grouped historical list of mitigation-related topics studied in JMR during 2001-2020. It is used as an illustrative example (vigilance against manipulative advertising), with no distinct discussion of its mechanism, findings, or direct influence on the article's conceptual development. Because the citation functions as background cataloging rather than a specific intellectual building block, the role is mention-only.
